item.text: {"id":"urn:molaug-v0:machine","verdict":"REPAIR","gloss_scholarly":true,"explication_carries_gloss":false,"self_flag_correct":false,"sense_collision_free":true,"reason":"The rendering gives a many-part tool with brief human input and substantial output, but does not encode that the parts then move of themselves beyond that initiating action; add this criterial independence or mark the AST lossy."}
